prestazioni: Engine swap to a Chrysler *3.5L EGA V6* (from the 1993-1997 LH platform) with a *Garrett GT3582R* turbocharger, custom *Tial MV-R 44mm* wastegate, and *Precision Turbo 550cc* fuel injectors, paired with a *Holley Dominator EFI* standalone ECU for forced induction tuning (targeting 450whp on 93 octane)

Full *Mopar Performance* Stage 3 3.5L EGA bottom-end reinforcement kit (forged crank, Manley H-beam rods, JE forged pistons with 9.5:1 compression), paired with a *Comp Cams 268H* hydraulic roller camshaft (224°/230° duration, 0.520”/0.540” lift) and *Crane Cams* roller rockers for optimized valvetrain stability

Custom *Kooks 1.75” primary* long-tube headers with *3” stainless steel* exhaust system, featuring a *Borla XR-1* muffler and *Vibrant 1799* resonated mid-pipe for aggressive yet street-legal sound, paired with a *Mishimoto aluminum radiator* and *Flex-a-lite 3000cfm* electric fan setup for thermal management
estetica: Full *RK Sport* widebody conversion kit (1994-1996 New Yorker-specific, retaining OEM chrome trim) with *custom 3M Brushed Metallic Silver* wrap and *Oracle Halo LED* headlight/foglight retrofit (DRL mode with sequential turn signals)

Custom *Billet Specialties* billet grille insert (replacing the OEM egg-crate design) with a *hidden push-button start* panel in the center, paired with *Hella Rallye 4000* auxiliary lights mounted in the lower bumper (Cibie Oscar-style covers for retro JDM/Euro rally aesthetics)

Interior overhaul with *Recaro SRD* front seats (retaining OEM power adjustments), *Momo Prototipo* flat-bottom steering wheel (with *Chrysler Pentastar* horn button), and *Vintage Air Gen-IV* climate control system (hidden in the OEM center console), finished with *Dynamat Xtreme* sound deadening and *Alcantara* headliner
